## Recipes.Converters.procedures variable

Converter for recipe procedures with preferred selection. Validates that preferredId (if specified) exists in options.

**Signature:**

```typescript
procedures: Converter<IOptionsWithPreferred<IProcedureRef, ProcedureId>>
```
